name: Marcus J.
message: Super quick shipping and the booster box was packaged perfectly! Not a single dent on the corners. Pulled an Alt Art too! Legit seller, definitely buying my Pokemon directly from S&G from now on.

name: Sarah P.
message: I was hesitant to buy cards off TikTok at first, but S&G Trading is incredibly trustworthy. Factory sealed, fast delivery, and they even threw in a few extra top loaders. Thank you!

name: David W.
message: Hands down the best packaging I've ever seen for trading cards. Box was bubble wrapped inside of another box. Arrived flawlessly. Highly recommended.
